MNY Photo

Cinematic, editorial photography—crafted with warmth, restraint, and intention.

From weddings to brand sessions, we build images that feel like a film still: quiet luxury, honest emotion, precise light.

Start Your Inquiry View Work
Guided directionClear prompts, never stiff posing.
Warm-luxury toneIvory highlights + cinematic contrast.
Fast repliesReply goal: 2 business days.
editorial setlight + story

Brand statement

An art-directed approach—so the final gallery feels cohesive, elevated, and unmistakably you.

MNY Photo works like an editorial team: we shape the mood, simplify the plan, and photograph what matters. The result is timeless imagery with cinematic depth—built for real life, not performance.

  • Natural direction and clean composition.
  • Warm color, honest texture, minimal distractions.
  • A gallery that reads like a story.

Work

A curated mix of moments—wide frames, quiet details, and portraits with presence.

These are local SVG placeholders for the preview. Replace with real photography in WordPress media.

Wedding, slow cinema

Glances, movement, and light you can feel.

Branding with restraint

Editorial portraits built for premium websites.

Event coverage, elevated

Candid moments with intentional framing.

Product detail, cinematic

Soft highlights, precise textures, rich contrast.

Family lifestyle, quiet

Warm motion with space to breathe.

Black + white editorial

Shape, shadow, and timeless composition.

Couple session, story-led

A narrative set—directed, never stiff.

Commercial campaign

Clean art direction with cinematic mood.

Studio session

Soft shadows and editorial stillness.

Explore services Book a Session

What we do

Photo sessions designed like a set: curated, calm, and art-directed.

Choose a starting point—then we tailor the plan around your story and the light.

Weddings

Cinematic coverage with editorial pacing—built around moments, not a shot list.

  • Timeline collaboration
  • Natural direction
  • Gallery delivery

Brand Sessions

Premium portraits and detail frames designed for web, press, and launches.

  • Moodboard + styling notes
  • Usage-minded framing
  • On-brand delivery

Couples

A relaxed, art-directed set with movement prompts and timeless composition.

  • Editorial prompts
  • Golden-hour planning
  • Multiple looks

Events

Brand launches and celebrations with discreet coverage and clean frames.

  • Guest candids
  • Detail coverage
  • Fast highlights

Product / Detail

Cinematic product sets with rich texture and controlled highlights.

  • Consistent lighting
  • Macro texture frames
  • Usage-aware crops

Families

Warm lifestyle photography—quiet, honest, and never overly posed.

  • Comfort-first direction
  • Documentary moments
  • Indoor/outdoor flexibility

Booking

Tell us the date and the mood. We’ll build the session around it.

Start Your Inquiry

Signature style

Modern editorial with cinematic restraint.

A few quiet rules we keep so the work feels timeless.

Light-first

We photograph what the light is already doing—then refine.

Editorial pacing

Images read like a story: wide, detail, portrait, breath.

Gentle direction

Clear prompts that keep you present—never posed to exhaustion.

Warm-luxury finish

Ivory highlights, soft shadows, rich midtones.

Process

High-touch process. Minimal friction. Beautiful delivery.

We keep planning simple and focused, so you can stay present and the photos can breathe.

  1. InquirySend a note with date + location. We confirm availability and intention.
  2. Creative directionWardrobe guidance, pacing, and a calm shot framework.
  3. Shoot dayGuided, calm, efficient—clean frames with space to breathe.
  4. Edit + toneWarm ivory highlights and cinematic contrast with true skin tones.
  5. DeliveryA private gallery designed for sharing and revisiting.

Who we are

A small studio with a big respect for quiet moments.

MNY Photo blends documentary honesty with editorial polish. We work quickly, calmly, and with a light hand—so the photos feel like you, at your best.

Meet the team See recent work

Collections

Collections that feel editorial—without the chaos.

Use these as a starting point; everything is tailored after inquiry.

Essentials

  • Planning call + direction
  • 90 minutes coverage
  • Online gallery delivery

  • Creative direction + styling notes

  • Moodboard + shot plan
  • Usage-aware image set

Testimonials

Warm words from clients.

Press + partners

A studio built for premium brands and intimate celebrations.

We collaborate with planners, designers, and founders to create imagery that matches the room and the website.

Atelier Harbor Studio Stone & Silk Candlelight Co. Modern Bloom Gallery No. 7

Explore services

Questions

A few quick answers.

Do you help with posing?

Yes—through editorial direction. You’ll get simple movement prompts and refinements that keep expressions real.

What should we wear?

After booking, you’ll receive a styling guide with color palettes, texture notes, and timeless examples.

How do we choose a location?

We choose based on light, mood, and comfort. Indoor options are always on the table.

Can you travel?

Yes—travel is available by request. Share your city and date, and we’ll confirm timing and feasibility.

Read resources

Resources

Guides that keep planning simple.

Short reads to help you choose locations, wardrobe, and pacing—without the overwhelm.

Wardrobe + texture

Neutral palettes, subtle contrast, and materials that photograph beautifully.

Where to place portraits so the day feels calm and the light stays soft.

Location selection

Contact

Tell us the date and the mood. We’ll build the session around it.

Share a few details and we’ll reply within 2 business days with next steps and collection options.

Start Your Inquiry View Work

Prefer email? Write to hello@mnyphoto.example.

Availability

Limited bookings—so each gallery gets full attention.

We take a limited number of sessions per month to protect quality and turnaround. If your date is soon, mention urgency in your message.

Check your date Read planning guides

What to include

  • Date + location
  • Session type (wedding, brand, couples, event)
  • The mood you want the images to feel like

Next step

Ready for images that feel like a film still?

Send a short note—date, location, and the mood—and we’ll reply with availability and options.
